steps.title: Form a direct question
steps.content: The sentence asks two direct questions: what atmospheric rivers are and how they affect weather. The second question needs auxiliary-before-subject word order and must end with a question mark.

steps.title: Fix order and punctuation
steps.content: Choice A has the right word order but ends with a period. Choice B has statement word order and a period. Choice D ends with a question mark but keeps statement word order. The answer is C.
